action.reasoning: Observation: Working FP+MLP baseline achieved avg_precision=0.1633 (val AP 0.1712) after fixing RDKit mol reconstruction and caching fps; training used only 2 epochs with last loss ~0.044, caches now exist for fast future runs. No PyG path due to prior segfaults on imports. Analysis: Extreme imbalance addressed poorly so far (no pos_weight); short training + no scheduler + last-model-save limits performance. Per-epoch val AP (per-task, NaN-masked via sklearn) + best checkpoint + AdamW + cosine LR + pos_weights (computed from train labels) + 10 epochs (now feasible post-cache) will improve without arch changes or new dependencies. Incremental edit to train.py only (model/predict unchanged for compatibility). Decision: Rewrite train.py with these enhancements, best.pt saving, metrics logging for val_ap; run training then submit_eval on best checkpoint for updated primary metric.
